{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322014836A8873C1400E774ACD1A1"}"},"total":138515},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7354982006815245118","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"超好看哈哈哈哈哈哈哈，女主发疯创飞所有人，特别搞笑。男主对女主的眼神拉丝很带感，想看更多的互动。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1712468916,"group_id":"7342400869209492542","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"记录看过的书。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6eqyV1X0ieef3cGXrqo5KVIOVeIA+JkW2fJ6Eri0DuG","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/7c8f05c38fad42968ee9615c4cbeb494~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776708802&x-signature=Q024XBPUBqC1KgkmdVOi46c%2FUF0%3D","user_id":"1785198121328397","user_name":"晚晚w"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1785198121328397","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7342400869209492542","book_info":{"abstract":"【1v1超甜+沙雕玩梗+娱乐圈+恋综+打脸】
【发癫女明星vs脑回路清奇总裁】
因被渣男背刺，刚穿书就被极端CP粉一刀捅进医院。
谢弥原地发疯，在直播间口出狂言。
“来！捅我！都来捅我！我直接引爆地球——”
误入直播间的路人差点被吓晕。
好好好，见过讨好型人格，还是头一次见到讨死型人格。
-
戴面具参加恋综，初次登场就暴揍普信男。
弹幕直呼：爱了！粉了！快让我看看她是谁！
于是谢弥摘掉面具露出真容。
弹幕沉默，弹幕惊恐，弹幕震怒。
【草！！！！！】
谢弥邪魅一笑：“没想到吧小黑子，你活爹来了。”
-
后来。
谢弥凭一己之力把恋综变成癫综，节目组从最初的无可奈何到最后含泪配合。
财阀公子喊她爹，反差淑女成她迷妹，偏执少爷被她死死拿捏，恶毒千金更是化身傲娇怪。
弹幕两级反转：
【这姐不是人设，这姐是真癫】
【别管！老子爱她！！！】
-
神秘总裁脑回路清奇，却唯独与她灵魂共振。
节目组配置心率手环，心率到达120便会响起铃声。
众人使出浑身解数也无法让他心率上升半分，她却只是站在那便令他铃声大起。
再后来，他终于承认了。
“对，我上节目就是冲她去的。”
“我很早就认识她了。”
【永远不按套路","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/1c88bee011c46d34dbd8a4788fa2a1e4","author":"小盐子","author_id":"","book_id":"7342400869209492542","book_name":"癫，都癫，癫点好啊","book_short_name":"蓄意逐风","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#60b0e8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"78.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":745,"name":"星光璀璨","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=745&name=星光璀璨&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":29,"name":"总裁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=29&name=总裁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":96,"name":"甜宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=96&name=甜宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":43,"name":"娱乐圈","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=43&name=娱乐圈&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":382,"name":"穿书","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=382&name=穿书&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":457,"name":"虐渣","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=457&name=虐渣&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":486,"name":"明星","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=486&name=明星&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_ty
